#about_floki
Smart Age Requires Smart Solutions!

Founded in 2010, Floki Systems is a global leader in business software solutions, AI-driven automation, ERP implementations, and integrated technologies. Our mission is to empower businesses with smart, scalable, and high-performance solutions that streamline operations, enhance customer experiences, and drive sustainable growth. We deliver tailored solutions with a client-focused approach ensuring that we understand and meet the unique needs of businesses across various industries, helping them stay ahead in today’s fast-paced digital world.

Read More
#One_Stop_Tech_Partner
One Place for all your Tech Needs

Management Systems for 50+ Industries

Streamline your business with powerful Odoo-based or custom management systems tailored to your industry.

AI Development and Integrations

Enhance efficiency with AI-driven solutions, from automation to intelligent analytics, seamlessly integrated into your workflows.

Ecommerce and Portfolio Websites

Get a high-performance, user-friendly website—whether for online stores or professional portfolios—designed for growth.

Mobile and Web Applications

We develop sleek, scalable mobile and web apps that deliver seamless user experiences across all your Devices.

Home and Office Automation

Upgrade your living with cutting-edge smart home automation for security, convenience, and energy efficiency.

Digital Marketing and Design

Boost your online presence with data-driven digital marketing strategies, including SEO, ads, and social media management.
